title: clytostoma decorum
intro: Clytostoma decorum, also known as the butterfly bush, is a flowering plant in the family Bignonaceae. It is native to South Africa and is known for its vibrant purple flowers that attract butterflies and other pollinators. The medicinal properties of Clytostoma decorum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
